name: Larb Gai
intro: Savor the vibrant flavors of Larb Gai, a delectable Thai chicken salad featuring fragrant ground chicken, zesty chilies, and aromatic mint and basil. This versatile dish can be enjoyed as a refreshing main course salad or served as an appetizer to tantalize your taste buds. For a heartier meal, pair it with rice to create a truly satisfying dining experience.
method: Cook chicken in a large pan over medium heat for 8-10 minutes. Remove the chicken from the pan when done.
Add oil into the same pan, then stir-fry the red onion and pepper for 3-4 minutes.
Fry the garlic in the same pan for 1 minute.
Add cooked chicken (Step 1), lemon juice, fish sauce, chili paste, brown sugar, and sriracha. Stir well.
Serve with rice and Boston lettuce leaves.
